# ClockPlus

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ClockPlus;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ClockPlus { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
time, watch, alarm, add, create, new

## Categories
time

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/clock-plus)
